summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed candidates. No GitHub mutations, merges, fix PRs, or close actions are emitted. Security-sensitive refs are scoped to route_security; unrelated open PRs are kept for maintainer review or related issue follow-up; the already-closed PR is kept closed.
